item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description: Maintenance release. Internal release tooling moved to a single `make release` command — no user-facing changes.

item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description:
SEO page polish.

  • Peak Hours heatmap — 7×24 grid (days × hours) replacing the old text list. Cell intensity scales with pageview count; tap a cell to see exact weekday / hour / views below.
  • 90-Day Trend tap-to-inspect — tap or drag along the chart to read the date and value at that point. The most recent point is selected by default.

This release also exercises the Sparkle auto-update flow over v1.0.3.

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
First actually-launchable build of the macOS app.

  • Fixed dyld rpath so Sparkle.framework resolves on macOS (the iOS-only @executable_path/Frameworks rpath couldn't find frameworks at the macOS bundle layout's Contents/Frameworks/).
  • Dropped hardened runtime from ad-hoc resign — incompatible with ad-hoc framework loading.
  • Sparkle auto-update channel established with this release.

v1.0.1 and v1.0.2 remain in GitHub release history but are no longer offered through this appcast.
